description: Accounts in Hebrew and Judaeo-Arabic, with some Romance words (e.g., grande) and possibly some words of Turkish or Persian origin. The commodities mentioned are mainly textiles/garments. Names mentioned include Eliʿezer al-Griego and Yosef b. ha-Ḥakham. Currencies include קרונה, גדיד, and פצה.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
